prompt: Dark studio, dramatic violet beam splits black void revealing floating text 'Quantify Every Trade' in crisp white. Camera slowly pushes forward, particles dissolve into glowing purple UI interface.
Sleek smartphone held by steady hand, dark background, soft purple rim light. Finger taps asset price field, types '42500', input field pulses violet glow confirming entry. Smooth macro focus pull.

Smartphone screen fills frame, probability-weighted EV result animates upward with green accent numbers. Camera pulls back slowly revealing full app UI, dramatic cinematic grade, deep navy-to-purple gradient background.
